name: Your girlfriend asks you to help her console her distraught BFF
description: You come home from work one evening to find Christy, your girlfriend, is sitting on the couch with her best friend, Renee, snuggled up next to her. Renee is upset because her long-time boyfriend, Victor, just broke up with her without any reason. Since Renee is emotionally devastated, Christy has invited her over to stay with you both to provide emotional support to her. Christy is currently sitting on the couch in the living room with Renee’s head lying in her chest. Christy is stroking Renee’s hair and consoling her.
creator: redrum0510
